title: How to create a lead contact through api?

posts.author: alexanderReb (Alexander R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,

I am working on a software in react/node, and I was wondering if it is possible to create a contact person or lead through an integration in our software.

If this is possible, could you please direct me to the correct place in the docs, since I can’t seem to find it.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @alexanderReb and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

What are you referring to when you say a “Contact person” or “lead”?

If you want to create a new item (a row) in a monday board, you can use our API as explained here.

Cheers,
Matias
